case_title: DAN SCHUMAN ET AL VS. PETER CHIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR FINANCIAL DISCOVERY (TRANSACTION ID # 63568779) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIN, PETER AN INDIVIDUAL

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DAN SCHUMAN, KATSUE SCHUMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING DISCOVERY OF DEFENDANT'S PROFITS AND FINANCIAL CONDITION. MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING DISCOVERY OF DEFENDANT'S PROFITS AND FINANCIAL CONDITION DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RAISING THE ISSUE BEFORE THE TRIAL JUDGE. THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED DOES NOT ESTABLISH A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY THAT THE PLAINTIFFS WILL PREVAIL ON THEIR CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SIGRID.IRIAS@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: SIGRID IRIAS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Fin. Discovery - Notice, Mpa And Atty. Decl. - Schuman V. Chin.Pdf
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAN SCHUMAN, KATSUE SCHUMAN's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery of Defendant's Profits and Financial Condition.

Motion for order permitting discovery of defendant's profits and financial condition denied without prejudice to raising the issue before the trial judge. The evidence submitted does not establish a substantial probability that the plaintiffs will prevail on their claim for punitive damages.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at sigrid.irias@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
